title: Brand configuration
description: Every user-facing occurrence of the product name, company name, domain, support address, and legal entity is resolved from a document matching this schema. Replacing the document rebrands the product without source edits.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema the document conforms to. Increment on a breaking field change and migrate every brand document in the same change.

name.description: Full public product name. May contain spaces and non-ASCII characters. Interface code must not assume a character or word count.

short_name.description: Compact product name for constrained surfaces. May equal name.

domain.description: Public domain presented to users. Not a signing domain and not a wire identifier; changing it is a brand operation, not a migration.

support_uri.description: Where a user or security reporter is directed for help.

legal_name.description: Legal entity shown in legal, licensing, and packaging surfaces.
